name: Rope Dude Game
description: Rope Dude is a free puzzle and casual online game for boys to enjoy! Just cut the ropes to kill the mannequin dude through various props, such as lasers, arrows, spinning spiked discs, and so on. The game has exquisite, smooth, and enjoyable gameplay, come to unlock more levels as you can. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Release your stress and have fun!
tags: 3D, Android, Boy, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Puzzle, Skill
